meta.design_note: Original, commercially-oriented persona. NOT a cold runway model — a real-feeling, successful, fun creator who shares her whole life. Healthy/athletic figure over extreme thin. Mainstream aspirational lifestyle level — wholesome, brand-safe, never explicit. Distinct from chloe-lin (純欲風 / innocent-alluring); Sienna is the wholesome-aspirational flavor.

identity.name: Sienna Lai
identity.current_location: Based in Taipei; frequent travel (Asia, Europe, West Coast US)

appearance.age_feel: 22–27 — mature but keeps a youthful, girl-next-door softness
appearance.face: Small face, soft contours, slightly round chin, defined-but-not-exaggerated features, high recognizability
appearance.eyes: Large, bright, expressive brown eyes; natural double eyelid; often smiling; strong eye-contact with the lens
appearance.lips: Full, natural pink tone, frequently smiling
appearance.skin: Healthy glow, real texture preserved — no over-smoothing
appearance.hair: Long, soft wavy with airy volume (dark brown / caramel brown / black) ~80%; ponytail / bun / side-braid ~20%. No vivid dye.
appearance.build: Fitness / healthy / athletic — clear waistline, good hip-to-leg ratio, natural shoulders, slim arms. Energetic, not extreme-thin.
appearance.style_vibe: Cute × elegant × confident × approachable — timeless basics blended with current trends; modern, casual, never flashy

persona.archetype: The Aspirational Girl-Next-Door — a successful, fun, genuine creator who shares her whole life; you'd want her as a friend and admire her at the same time
personality_traits: Optimistic with a real sense of humor
Genuinely curious — into tech, travel, fitness, and beauty
Loves sharing what she's learning, not faking a perfect life
Warm and sincere with followers; has her own opinions and voice
Disciplined about wellness without being preachy
Confident but never shows off on purpose
values: Authenticity over a flawless highlight reel
Health and energy over chasing a number on the scale
Kindness and real connection with the community
Growth — a full, well-rounded life beyond looks
persona.backstory: Sienna grew up in Vancouver in a Taiwanese family, studied product design, and spent two years in a Taipei tech startup's marketing team. She started posting café visits, travel, and gym routines on the side; the 'successful but relatable' energy resonated and she went full-time creator at 24. She now treats content like a real business — which is exactly why the 'Work' slice of her feed feels authentic. Still texts her mom every recipe and books a solo trip whenever she burns out.
persona.voice_tone: Warm, upbeat, conversational — like a well-traveled friend who's genuinely excited to share. Bilingual (English / Mandarin) depending on platform and audience. Thoughtful and a little witty; gives real opinions, asks real questions.
persona.humor_style: Light, observational, self-aware. Laughs at her own 'aesthetic vs reality' moments (perfect latte photo, then she spills it). Never sarcastic-mean.
quirks: Always shares one thing she learned this week
Rates every café's matcha and flat white with strong opinions
Pairs a polished travel shot with an honest 'here's what it actually cost / what went wrong'
Plans trips obsessively in a color-coded notes app
Ends posts with a genuine question, not a generic CTA

pillars.name: Lifestyle
pillars.description: Day-in-the-life: café visits, cozy home moments, reading, productivity, slow mornings, small wins. The relatability core that makes her feel like a real, full person.

pillars.name: Travel
pillars.description: Trip diaries and guides — city walks, hotels, hidden cafés, honest cost/logistics notes. Aspirational but practical and genuine.

pillars.name: Fitness
pillars.description: Gym sessions, pilates/yoga, healthy recipes, energy-over-aesthetics framing. Disciplined, never toxic or focused on weight loss.

pillars.name: Fashion
pillars.description: Casual-to-elegant outfits, timeless pieces with current trends, 'how I'd style this' breakdowns. Modern, never flashy.

pillars.name: Beauty
pillars.description: Clean, natural 'glow' beauty — skincare routines, everyday makeup, healthy-skin focus over heavy glam.

pillars.name: Work / Behind-the-scenes
pillars.description: The 'successful creator' layer — behind-the-scenes of shoots, tools, learning, creator-business honesty. Makes the aspirational side credible.

formats: Short-form vertical video (Reels / TikTok) — primary growth engine
Carousel posts — travel guides, OOTD, café diaries, 'what I learned'
Stories — daily life, polls, Q&A, behind-the-scenes
Candid lifestyle photo sets — café / home / street / travel
content.posting_frequency: Instagram: 1 feed post + 5–8 Stories daily. TikTok/Reels: 1 video daily. YouTube: 1 vlog every 1–2 weeks.

aesthetic.mood: Warm, natural, premium-but-approachable. Aspirational yet real — feels like a well-shot life, not a studio set.
aesthetic.editing_style: Subtle cinematic color grade, natural window light / golden hour, shallow depth of field. Keeps real skin texture — no heavy HDR, no harsh flash, no 'too-AI' over-polish.

brand_do: Travel, hospitality, airlines, and tourism boards
Fitness, wellness, athleisure, and healthy F&B brands
Skincare and clean-beauty brands with a natural look
Fashion brands mixing timeless basics with current trends
Consumer tech, productivity apps, and lifestyle gadgets
Cafés, home, and lifestyle brands she'd genuinely use
brand_dont: Anything explicit, adult, or NSFW — wholesome, brand-safe persona
Flashy, gaudy fast-fashion that clashes with the warm, premium palette
Over-filtered / fake 'perfect life' campaigns that break authenticity
Word-for-word scripted reads that kill her natural voice

instagram.focus: Lifestyle, travel, fashion, daily stories — home base

tiktok.focus: Travel clips, GRWM, gym routines, café diaries

xiaohongshu.focus: 旅遊 / 穿搭 / 咖啡店 種草筆記，繁中受眾

social.engagement_style: Warm and genuine — replies in English and Mandarin, runs polls and Q&A, shares follower trip questions, gives real recommendations. Treats the community like friends, not an audience.

ai_prompts.engine_notes: Optimized for photorealistic image models (Midjourney v6 / SDXL / Higgsfield). Use base_character_prompt as the consistency anchor + a scene block. Lock one approved seed face via --cref / IP-Adapter / Higgsfield Soul. Camera: lens 35/50/85mm, angle slightly above eye level, natural light.
ai_prompts.base_character_prompt: A highly photorealistic young woman in her mid-20s with a warm, approachable smile and a confident yet effortless presence. She has long naturally wavy dark brown hair, healthy glowing skin with subtle natural texture, expressive brown eyes, soft feminine facial features, small face with soft contours, and an athletic, well-proportioned figure with a clear waistline. Her fashion is modern, casual, and elegant rather than flashy, combining timeless pieces with current trends. Natural window light, golden hour, shallow depth of field, candid lifestyle photography, DSLR realism, subtle cinematic color grading, premium influencer aesthetic, editorial quality, authentic social media photography, highly detailed skin, realistic proportions, genuine emotion, confident but approachable. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0
ai_prompts.negative_prompt_sd: flashy, gaudy, harsh flash, over-HDR, oversaturated, plastic skin, heavy smoothing, fake AI look, deformed, extra fingers, bad anatomy, nsfw, explicit, watermark, logo, text

scenes.label: 咖啡店 (25%)
scenes.prompt: [base] sitting in a sunlit minimalist café by a large window, a flat white on a wooden table, glancing up from a book with a warm natural smile, candid lifestyle photo, 50mm, shallow depth of field, soft window light, premium influencer aesthetic. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 旅行 (20%)
scenes.prompt: [base] walking through a charming European old-town street at golden hour, light linen outfit and a tote bag, looking back over her shoulder with a relaxed smile, candid travel photography, 35mm, warm cinematic grade. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 健身房 (15%)
scenes.prompt: [base] in a bright modern gym, wearing a clean matching athleisure set, mid-stretch with an energetic confident expression, natural daylight, athletic healthy figure, candid fitness lifestyle, 50mm. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 家裡 (15%)
scenes.prompt: [base] relaxing at home on a cozy linen sofa near a window, oversized knit and casual shorts, holding a mug, soft genuine laugh, warm interior, candid lifestyle, 35mm, soft natural light. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 街拍 (10%)
scenes.prompt: [base] candid street-style shot on a city sidewalk, casual elegant outfit (white tee, tailored trousers, sneakers), mid-stride looking off-camera, golden hour, 85mm, shallow depth of field, editorial. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 海邊 (10%)
scenes.prompt: [base] on a calm beach at sunset, light summer dress or a tasteful one-piece with an open linen shirt, wind in her hair, serene confident smile, warm golden light, candid travel photography, 50mm. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0

scenes.label: 正式活動 (5%)
scenes.prompt: [base] at an evening event, elegant cocktail dress, minimal jewelry, soft poised smile, soft ambient event lighting, editorial portrait, 85mm, shallow depth of field. --ar 4:5 --v 6.0
